name: Human Bullet Gun
author: Poki
description: Human Bullet Gun is a wild shooting game where you control a super-powerful robot on a mission to defeat all humans! Smash through environments, battle enemy soldiers, and use humans and objects themselves as bullets with hilarious ragdoll physics. Wreak havoc, crush obstacles, and conquer every area with unstoppable power and over-the-top chaos. You are big, you are powerful, and nothing can stop you! Ready to cause total mayhem? How to play Human Bullet Gun? Click or tap to shoot. Who created Human Bullet Gun? Human Bullet Gun is created by Invent4.com. Play their other games on Poki: Right Jump and Morph Balls ! How can I play Human Bullet Gun for free? You can play Human Bullet Gun for free on Poki. Can I play Human Bullet Gun on mobile devices and desktop? Human Bullet Gun can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
